task_completion.description: Navigate to the gym management or gym list page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser shows a list of gyms or the gym management section within the wger application or Django admin interface.

task_completion.description: Select the target gym 'Iron Works Fitness Center'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the details, edit page, or management dashboard specifically for 'Iron Works Fitness Center'.

task_completion.description: Access the interface to add a user or member to the gym.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or specific page section for adding a user/member to the gym is visible.

task_completion.description: Select or input the target user 'maria_coach'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The username 'maria_coach' is typed into a search field, selected from a dropdown menu, or checked in a list of available users.

task_completion.description: Confirm the user has been successfully assigned to the gym.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., toast notification) is displayed confirming the assignment, or 'maria_coach' is visibly listed under the active members/users of 'Iron Works Fitness Center'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the application via the graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser being used to navigate the wger application, with visible clicks or form interactions.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual wger fitness manager application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the wger web application or its Django admin panel, rather than a text editor, terminal, or fabricated HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of terminal windows executing database commands, curl requests, or python scripts to assign the user.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected user to be assigned is 'maria_coach'. The expected gym to receive the new member is 'Iron Works Fitness Center'.
